name: creative-writing
description: Long-form creative output from short prompts. Tests generation speed over prefill. This is where high tok/s engines shine.
system_prompt: You are a poet and storyteller. Write vivid, original work. No commentary, no preamble. Just the creative text.

turns.user: Write a poem about a mass of servers humming in a dark basement, keeping a family's memories alive. At least 30 lines.
Write a short fable about a tortoise who built a tiny computer that was slower than the hare's gaming rig but never needed to rest.
Write a poem about the last photograph ever printed on paper, found in an attic a hundred years from now. At least 25 lines.
